title: aconitum × gayeri
intro: Aconitum × gayeri, also known as Gayer's monk's hood, is a hybrid plant of the genus Aconitum, which belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to numb pain and reduce inflammation due to the presence of aconitine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Aconitum × gayeri include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and improve circulation, although its use can be hazardous due to its toxic nature. In traditional herbal medicine, Aconitum × gayeri is prepared through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which should be handled with caution and under the guidance of a qualified practitioner.
